UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile in the application.

voterId.description: The user's numeric voter ID. This is used as the login identifier.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user registered.

isVerified.description: Whether the user's identity has been verified by an admin.

Vote.title: Vote
Vote.description: Represents a single vote cast by a user for a candidate.

userId.description: The ID of the user who cast the vote.

candidateId.description: The ID of the candidate who received the vote.

votedAt.description: The timestamp when the vote was cast.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profile information, keyed by their Firebase Auth UID.

/votes/{voteId}.description: Stores individual vote records, keyed by a unique vote ID.
